ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_quality_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality sample */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the water sample */,
  "DO" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen level (mg/L) */,
  "EC" INTEGER /* Electrical conductivity (µS/cm) */,
  "WT" REAL /* Water temperature (°C) */,
  "BOD" REAL /* Biochemical oxygen demand (BOD) level (mg/L) */,
  "COD" REAL /* Chemical oxygen demand (COD) level (mg/L) */,
  "TOC" REAL /* Total organic carbon (TOC) level (mg/L) */,
  "Chla" REAL /* Chlorophyll a concentration (µg/L) */,
  "SS" REAL /* Suspended solids (SS) concentration (mg/L) */,
  "TN" REAL /* Total nitrogen (TN) concentration (mg/L) */,
  "TP" REAL /* Total phosphorus (TP) concentration (mg/L) */,
  "NH3N" REAL /* Ammonia nitrogen (NH3N) concentration (mg/L) */,
  "PO4P" REAL /* Soluble phosphorus (PO4P) concentration (mg/L) */,
  "flow" REAL /* Flow rate (m³/s) */,
  "rain" REAL /* Rainfall amount (mm) */,
  "logTC" REAL /* Log transformation of total coliforms */,
  "logFC" REAL /* Log transformation of fecal coliforms */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the sample */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sample data is valid (0 for invalid, 1 for valid) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_samples_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sampling location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sampling location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sampling site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sampling location */,
  "water_body_type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., lake, river, stream) */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the sampling location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water quality sample */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sampling location */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sampling_time" TEXT /* Time when the sample was collected */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during sampling (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Sampling methodology used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES sampling_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_quality_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold set */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., pH, DO) */,
  "max_limit" REAL /* Maximum acceptable limit for the parameter */,
  "min_limit" REAL /* Minimum acceptable limit for the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sampling event related to the alert */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter that exceeded its threshold */,
  "exceed_value" REAL /* Value that exceeded the threshold */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for addressing the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES sampling_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly summary, incident report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or departments the report is shared with */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., sensor, manual collection) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
